column1: # Import the test cases you want to use to test your agent
# Limitations
# - maximum of 100 questions
# - maximum 500 characters per question including spaces
# Imported columns
# question - User question that the agent will answer.
# expectedResponse - Expected responses to run match, similarity and compare meaning test cases.
# Test methods
# - Test methods are not included in this template. You can configure test methods after importing the test cases.
# - Initially, the default test method will be added to the imported test set.
# For more information, see the documentation.
question
column2: expectedResponse

column1: What is the temperature range of the soldering station?
column2: The Contoso ThermaPro SS-90D soldering station (CE-SOL-0450) has a temperature range of 100 °C to 450 °C with ±2 °C stability.

column1: The soldering station shows error E-04. What does it mean?
column2: Error E-04 on the soldering station indicates a heating element open circuit. You should replace the heater cartridge.

column1: How many heating zones does the reflow oven have?
column2: The Contoso ThermFlow RO-800 reflow oven (CE-RFO-2100) has 8 top and 8 bottom heating zones, for 16 zones total.

column1: What causes cold solder joints on the reflow oven?
column2: Cold solder joints on the reflow oven are typically caused by incorrect profile settings. Verify the peak temperature and time-above-liquidus in the reflow profile.

column1: What temperature and humidity range does the environmental test chamber support?
column2: The Contoso ClimaTest EC-2000 environmental test chamber (CE-ETC-3100) supports −70 °C to +180 °C and 10% to 98% relative humidity.

column1: How do I fix a humidity error on the environmental chamber?
column2: To fix a humidity error on the environmental test chamber, refill the water reservoir, clean the humidity wick, and verify the humidity sensor is functioning correctly.

column1: What coating types does the conformal coating machine support?
column2: The Contoso CoatShield CC-400 conformal coating machine (CE-CCM-2800) supports acrylic, silicone, and urethane coating types.

column1: What is the alignment accuracy of the solder paste stencil printer?
column2: The Contoso PrintPro SP-700 solder paste stencil printer (CE-SPP-2000) has an alignment accuracy of ±12.5 µm at 6σ.

column1: What are the outputs of the programmable DC power supply?
column2: The Contoso PowerBench PS-3060 programmable DC power supply (CE-PSU-1400) has triple output: two channels of 0–30 V / 5 A and one channel of 0–6 V / 3 A.

column1: How do I reduce false calls on the AOI system?
column2: To reduce false calls on the Automated Optical Inspection system (CE-AOI-2400), retune the detection thresholds, clean the optics, and verify the lighting calibration.

column1: What is the bandwidth of the digital oscilloscope?
column2: The Contoso WaveView DSO-4000X digital oscilloscope (CE-OSC-1200) has a 1 GHz bandwidth with 4 channels and a 5 GSa/s sample rate.

column1: The oscilloscope self-calibration fails. What should I do?
column2: If the oscilloscope self-calibration fails, allow a 20-minute warm-up period, disconnect all inputs from the front panel, then retry the calibration procedure.

column1: What materials must never be cut on the laser cutter?
column2: Never cut PVC or chlorinated plastics on the CO2 laser cutter (CE-LAS-3300). Only approved materials should be used.

column1: What is the laser cutter's work area and power?
column2: The Contoso PrecisionCut LC-150 CO2 laser cutter (CE-LAS-3300) has a 1300 × 900 mm work area and 150 W sealed CO2 laser power.

column1: What is the placement accuracy of the pick and place machine?
column2: The Contoso RapidPlace PP-3200 pick and place machine (CE-PNP-2200) has a placement accuracy of ±25 µm at 3σ and throughput up to 45,000 components per hour.

column1: Why is the wave soldering machine producing excessive dross?
column2: Excessive dross on the wave soldering machine (CE-WAV-2600) is typically caused by excessive wave turbulence. Reduce wave turbulence and verify that nitrogen inerting is functioning if equipped.

column1: What modulation types does the function generator support?
column2: The Contoso SignalGen FG-2200 function generator (CE-FGN-1300) supports AM, FM, PM, FSK, PWM, sweep, and burst modulation types.

column1: The bench multimeter shows no current reading. What's wrong?
column2: If the bench multimeter (CE-DMM-1100) shows no current reading, check the current-input fuse and verify the test lead is inserted in the correct current jack.

column1: What safety rules apply to the X-ray inspection system?
column2: The X-ray inspection system (CE-XRI-3400) uses ionizing radiation. Never bypass safety interlocks, only trained and certified operators may use the system, and all operators must wear a dosimeter badge.

column1: How do I clear an ESD wrist strap monitor alarm?
column2: To clear an ESD wrist strap monitor alarm on the ESD-protected workstation (CE-ESD-0100), check the wrist strap fit and cord connection. Replace the strap or cord if worn.

column1: List the safety precautions for all our soldering-related equipment.
column2: Safety precautions span multiple pieces of soldering equipment. The soldering station (CE-SOL-0450) requires proper tip maintenance and burn prevention. The wave soldering machine (CE-WAV-2600) requires dross handling safety, proper ventilation, and protective equipment when working near molten solder. The reflow oven (CE-RFO-2100) requires awareness of high surface temperatures and proper exhaust ventilation.

column1: Which pieces of test and measurement equipment do we have and what are their key specs?
column2: Contoso has four test and measurement assets: the Digital Storage Oscilloscope (CE-OSC-1200) with 1 GHz bandwidth, the Function Generator (CE-FGN-1300) with AM/FM/PM/FSK/PWM modulation, the Bench Digital Multimeter (CE-DMM-1100), and the Programmable DC Power Supply (CE-PSU-1400) with triple output.

column1: Compare the reflow oven and the wave soldering machine — when do we use each?
column2: The reflow oven (CE-RFO-2100) is used for surface-mount (SMT) assemblies, melting solder paste applied to pads. The wave soldering machine (CE-WAV-2600) is used for through-hole components, passing the PCB over a wave of molten solder. Use reflow for SMT boards and wave soldering for through-hole or mixed assemblies.

column1: What maintenance is due monthly across our SMT line equipment?
column2: Monthly maintenance across the SMT line includes cleaning and inspecting the stencil printer (CE-SPP-2000) squeegees and stencils, calibrating the AOI system (CE-AOI-2400) optics and lighting, and cleaning and lubricating the pick-and-place machine (CE-PNP-2200) nozzles and feeders.

column1: Is the digital oscilloscope (CE-OSC-1200) still under warranty?
column2: The digital oscilloscope (CE-OSC-1200) is under active warranty. The warranty expires on 2027-03-14.

column1: Is the CO2 laser cutter (CE-LAS-3300) under warranty?
column2: The CO2 laser cutter (CE-LAS-3300) warranty has expired. The warranty expired on 2025-08-22.

column1: The laser cutter (CE-LAS-3300) needs service — create a work order.
column2: A work order has been created for the CO2 laser cutter (CE-LAS-3300) for service. The work order is now visible on the dashboard.

column1: The soldering station keeps throwing error E-04. Look up the fix and open a maintenance work order for it.
column2: Error E-04 on the soldering station (CE-SOL-0450) indicates a heating element open circuit — the heater cartridge should be replaced. A maintenance work order has been created for this repair.

column1: Check the warranty on the wave soldering machine (CE-WAV-2600) and, if expired, create a work order to renew the service contract.
column2: The warranty on the wave soldering machine (CE-WAV-2600) has expired (expired 2025-06-05). A work order has been created to renew the service contract.
